markdown:
# Lucky

You gain the following benefits.

## Luck Points

You have a number of Luck Points equal to your [[proficiency|Proficiency Bonus]] and can spend the points on the benefits below. You regain your expended Luck Points when you finish a [[long_rest]].

## Advantage

When you roll a d20 for a [[d20_test]], you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself [[advantage]] on the roll.

## Disadvantage

When a creature rolls a d20 for an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose [[disadvantage]] on that roll.
